Robinhood Launches Stock Tokens and L2 Blockchain To Expand Crypto Offerings in EU and US
articles.description: Robinhood tokenization has marked a new phase for the platform, offering over 200 US stock and ETF tokens for EU users, first on Arbitrum then a proprietary L2. The company has also launched crypto perpetual futures, Ethereum and Solana staking in the US, and an AI assistant.

articles.title: Trump-Linked USD1 Surpasses USDC in 24-Hour Trading Volume Milestone
articles.description: Trump family-backed USD1 stablecoin overtakes USDC in 24-hour trading volume, reaching $3. 37 billion.

articles.title: Solana Staking ETF Anticipated to Launch This Week
articles.description: According to Odaily, Bloomberg analyst James Seyffart shared on the X platform that a Solana staking ETF might be listed this week. Previously, REX Shares announced on the X platform the upcoming launch of the "REX-Osprey SOL+Staking ETF. " This ETF aims to track Solana's performance while generating returns through on-chain staking. It is reportedly the first staking cryptocurrency ETF in the United States
